title: Eat a variety of healthy foods - Canada.ca
content:
## Eat a variety of healthy foods
Eat well. Live well.
Enjoy a mix of veggies and fruits, whole grain foods, and protein foods daily!
Learn more at Canada.ca/FoodGuide
Download the poster ‘Eat well. Live well.’
PDF format, 212 KB, 1 page, 8.5 x 11
JPEG format, 1.28 MB, 1 page, 1080 x 1920
JPEG format, 358 KB, 1 page, 1920 x 1080
For recipes and more food guide resources visit: Canada.ca/FoodGuide
